---
title: "`r params$report_title`"
author: "`r params$report_author`"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  html_document:
    theme: flatly
    toc: false
    code_folding: hide
params:
  # Engine flag: TRUE only when this template is stitched into the
  # combined report (set by the parent). Leave false for normal renders.
  combined_mode: false
  # Master Data Path (one row per unit)
  data_path: !r here::here("1_data", "master_micro_survey.csv")

  # Variables
  group_var: "treatment_group"   # column that defines the comparison columns
  # Variables to summarize (list). Numeric -> mean (SD); categorical -> n (%).
  # NOTE: this is a LIST param, validated explicitly below.
  summary_vars:
    - baseline_score
    - endline_score
    - gender
    - income_tier
  # Decimal places for means / SDs / percentages
  digits: 1

  # Policy-Facing Labels
  metric_name: "Sample Characteristics"

  # --- Report Text (all editable; leave "" to use the smart default) ---
  report_title: "Table 1: Grouped Summary Statistics"
  report_author: "Ibraheem Saqib Ellahi"
  chart_title: ""
  chart_subtitle: ""
  source_note: "Generated via CERP Analytics Template"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = !isTRUE(params$combined_mode),
  warning = FALSE,
  message = FALSE
)
```

```{r cerp-style, echo=FALSE, results='asis', eval=!isTRUE(params$combined_mode)}
cat("<style>", readr::read_file(here::here("2_R", "cerp_style.css")), "</style>")
```

```{r load-and-prep}
library(tidyverse)
source(here::here("2_R", "2.5_helpers.R"), local = TRUE)

# gt is a Phase-10 dependency (renv owns it — never auto-install; hard rule 5).
if (!requireNamespace("gt", quietly = TRUE)) {
  stop("The 'gt' package is required for the summary table. ",
       "Run renv::restore() from the project root, then re-render.", call. = FALSE)
}
suppressMessages(library(gt))

# Load data (headers/values whitespace-scrubbed) and validate YAML params.
# summary_vars is a LIST param (does not end in _var), validated explicitly.
# All summary logic + gt styling live in viz_summary_table().
raw_data <- cerp_load(params$data_path)
cerp_validate(raw_data, c(params[grepl("_var$", names(params))], params$summary_vars))
```


```{r summary-table}
source(here::here("2_R", "2.0_setup_theme.R"), local = TRUE)
source(here::here("2_R", "2.6_viz_functions.R"), local = TRUE)

# Thin wrapper: viz_summary_table() RETURNS a gt object (not a ggplot); gt's
# knit_print renders it straight to HTML in both standalone and combined reports.
viz_summary_table(
  data           = raw_data,
  group_var      = params$group_var,
  summary_vars   = params$summary_vars,
  digits         = params$digits,
  metric_name    = params$metric_name,
  chart_title    = params$chart_title,
  chart_subtitle = params$chart_subtitle,
  source_note    = params$source_note
)
```
